evidence.q4: This Master Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into by and between BrightRiver Health, Inc. ("Customer") and LatticeBridge Systems, LLC ("Vendor") as of the effective date of the first Order Form.

evidence.q6: Neither party may assign this Agreement without the other party's prior written consent, except to an affiliate or successor in connection with a merger, reorganization, or sale of substantially all assets if the assignee assumes the assigning party's obligations.
